Container.Name: CPAP Analyzer
Container.Overview: AI-powered CPAP sleep data analysis for ResMed AirSense machines. Upload your SD card data and get interactive charts, trend analysis, and AI-generated reports you can actually understand. Features: - Interactive charts: pressure, leak, respiratory rate, tidal volume per night - Long-term trends: AHI over time, compliance rates, leak patterns - AI reports: human-readable analysis of any night - AI Q&A: ask questions about your sleep data in plain English - Session browser with AHI color coding Supports ResMed AirSense 10 & 11 (SD card EDF data).

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Database and uploaded CPAP data files

Config.Name: SD Card Data
Config.Description: Path to your ResMed SD card backup (read-only). Used for initial data load.

Config.Name: OPENAI_API_KEY
Config.Description: API key for AI features (OpenAI-compatible endpoint). Leave blank to disable AI.

Config.Name: OPENAI_BASE_URL
Config.Description: Base URL for OpenAI-compatible API endpoint
